overview: BAMM is a privacy-first personal finance platform with a secure e-commerce site for license management, premium feature purchases, and installer distribution, featuring a full four-tier admin panel with RBAC.
features: RSA-signed license generation and email delivery
Four-tier RBAC admin panel: Super Admin, Administrator, Features Manager, License Generator
Internet Identity authentication with Google, Apple, and Microsoft sign-in
Installer management for Mac and Windows downloads
Email delivery logs with transaction detail modals
Admin invite workflow with temp password via RESEND
One-time Super Admin claim code with regeneration
Audit log with download for all admin roles
